entry.title: AUTo TASK trigger based on QA UD
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

 

We are unable to determine Auto TASK Creation through the PPF based on Quality UD,

We have find out all cross process settings and  SAP EWM configurations, 

Kindly help to trigger AUTO task based on UD decisions 

 

Regards,



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: AUTo TASK trigger based on QA UD
entry.content:
Hi,

 

It is NOT possible to config the PPF action at Public Cloud WM.

But you can decide the follow up action after usage decision with customizing "Maintain Follow-Up Actions". Please refer below SAP Help Portal page:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/87f9b54f9c4f4e75aff0061860a6589a/abe178ec83404bb09841898a79565f4c.html?locale=en-US

 

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: Please explain Conditional router in detail in CPI
entry.content:
In the Conditional router, you can use either Non-XML or XML.

The previous reply showed examples for non-XML where this link was shared: Define Router | SAP Help Portal

For XML, you can use XPATH, and here is a link for examples on XPATH: Using XPath Functions

entry.title: Re: Understanding Joule - (Step #4) Joule Interaction Patterns
entry.content: @Raja_Gupta1  - Very informative and helpful , easy steps to learn. Which app you have used to create diagrams , they are so cool!!

entry.title: Difficulty accessing CUX website
entry.content:
Hi. I'm trying to access SaP CUX website, but I'm being redirected to SaP Joule page. Can you help me figure out how to access the CUX website? Thanks.

Website I want to access (Conversational experience website)- https://experience.sap.com/conversational-ux/

Website I'm redirected to - https://www.sap.com/germany/products/artificial-intelligence/ai-assistant.html

entry.title: Re: 有没有一个报表或者CDS，可以查看所有物料的标注价格、实际价格、库存数量、收发货数量
entry.content:
可以考虑使用以下CDS视图或报表来查看物料的价格、库存和收发货数量信息:

  1. 标准价格和实际价格:

    • I_InventoryPriceByKeyDate CDS视图提供物料价格信息
    • "物料价格分析"(CKM3)应用程序可以查看和导出价格数据

  2. 库存数量:

    • C_StockQtyCurrentValue_3 CDS视图提供当前库存数量和价值信息
    • I_ML_BALANCE CDS视图可以查看实际成本和库存

  3. 收发货数量:

    • I_GoodsMovementCube CDS视图提供货物移动分析数据
    • I_GoodsMovementDocumentDEX CDS视图用于提取货物移动文档数据

entry.title: BOM component loaded wrongly in Routing
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I am using LTMC to create ROUTING and in Component Assignment tab the information for ITEM ID , BOM Component and Item Number is mismatch when compare to BOM, like ITEM ID and Item Number are not matched with the BOM Component which I want to load. Due to which the BOM Component tagged to that routing is wrong. 

Now we want to remediate the data means wants to update the correct BOM Component . Need your advise on how to achieve that.

 

Thanks,

RJ

entry.title: Recovering from a large number of failed transport.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

When transferring a large amount of data at once, it may fail.

If there are too many failed transport, you may wish you could go back to the way things were before the transport.

In this case, we believe the only available procedure is to restore using a full backup taken before the transport.

Is there any other way?

Regards,
Hirotaka

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications

Hello!! @Tunir 

Could you please let us know how we can verify whether a report was created using the legacy experience? Also, is there any way to identify these reports in bulk?

entry.title: If I click back button or exit from the FIORI tile, an error occurs.
entry.content:
Dear. Every one

I carried out FIORI Embedded work.
After Embedded, an error message appears when you click the back button or the Exit button to return to the home screen from the FIORI tile.
Click the error message to bring the screen back to home.

Error Message

A back-end error has caused the application to terminate. Error message returned:
HTTP 0

entry.content:
Hi Ramesh, Please see the screenshot from postman for the receiver API.

 

Thanks

Gopal

entry.title: How to export a support case - SAP for Me
entry.content:
good morning we are unable to download an export of cases in sap 4 me


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to export a support case - SAP for Me
entry.content:
KBA 2442409 - How to export a support case - SAP for Me - SAP for Me

The customer support case can be exported as follows:

  1. Open the support case
  2. Click 'Export Case' button
  3. A new window opens with the exported case
  4. To save it as a local file or print as pdf, please use right mouse click in the middle of the exported case and click on 'print'.
  5. Now choose destination 'print to pdf' or 'save as pdf'

entry.title: Re: How to add a max aggregation calculation for previous...
entry.content: Your suggestion didn’t work exactly for my case, but it pointed me in the right direction. I solved it as follows: 1) Create a max‐aggregation calculation in the model: Just use the hsl field with no functions applied, set the exception aggregation type to Max, specify the exception aggregation dimension as budat.calmonth. 2) Create a restricted measure in the story referencing the max‐aggregation calculation from the model, use the budat date field as the dimension, configure values for the previous year (Navigation → Previous (Shift Previous Value) → Previous Year). 3) Add the budat field to the widget: select “Year” as the level in the date hierarchy

entry.title: Re: Wage types not showing in Earnings in payslip
entry.content:
Hope you are new to Payroll,

Firstly you need to Copy a Payslip form of your own later Include Respective Wage types of your in Cumulation IDs in payslip and assign that IDs to wage types in Evaluation class 2 in V_512W_D

Custom wage type will be displayed only if you configure the payslip currently you are seeing are standard payslip and the wage types which are being displayed are standard ones and they are already configured in SAP provided payslip

entry.title: Re: Missing Menu bar icons in Personas 3.0 after Kernel U...
entry.content:
For the benefit of others who possibly face a similar issue, here is the solution from the related support incident:

Your system is running with SAP BASIS 750 SP 08, which is a very old support package.

As a long-term solution, I would recommend rethinking your system update strategy, and to consume Support Packages in a timely manner.
Using the latest SAP_BASIS Support Package will also have the benefit of the new service handler "CL_HTTP_EXT_ITS_2" which is not affected by this issue - See also SAP Note 0002860209 - SAP GUI for HTML: New Service Handler.
- Use the latest SAP_BASIS SP is an SAP recommendation.
    
As a short-term solution, please make sure to update the currently used service handler: "CL_HTTP_EXT_ITS".
This is reasonable due to the error you are facing:
The MIME file to display icons (SAPGUI-icons.svg) will be loaded from a wrong path due to incorrect theming path.
   
To update the current handler ("CL_HTTP_EXT_ITS"), please implement the below SAP Notes and all of its prerequisites via transaction SNOTE:   
0002682722 - SAP GUI for HTML: False sized rendering on custom Fiori theme
0002761326 - SAP GUI for HTML: Unexpected results or sizes
0002990102- SAP GUI for HTML in SAP EP: Theme settings not correct
0003023461 - SAP GUI for HTML: Support of theme variants
0003023207 - SAP GUI for HTML: Activate Support For New Themes
0003038503 - SAP GUI for HTML: Consolidation Of Theme Related Corrections

entry.title: Re: Issue with Fiscal Week Configuration in SAC Planning...
entry.content: One thing maybe you try is to switch your date dimension from system managed to user managed, then you should be able to adjust the value of properties or even create your own properties and hierarchies.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Application Studio Deployment Failed in Production
entry.content: What is the error message in Show Log File?

entry.title: Re: Why I cannot find the project template when I create Project in PPM?
entry.content: Is the template assigned to an item type?

entry.title: Re: Save EXCEL file
entry.content: You are posting a reply / question to a thread which is more than 16 years old, already marked as solved  and to a member who is no longer active at this community ("Former Member"). Please open a new thread with your question, with some more details and maybe a bit of code.

entry.title: Cannot create production order via DIAPI
entry.content:
I try to create production order via DIAPI on SAP B1 10.0 SP 2411.

but it shows error when I submit the request 

                <a:ErrCode>-1116</a:ErrCode>
                <a:ErrMsg>Could not commit transaction: Error -1 detected during transaction</a:ErrMsg>
 
and below is my coding, please help to suggest.
 

oDoc = oCompany.GetBusinessObject(SAPbobsCOM.BoObjectTypes.oProductionOrders)
oDoc.Series = Get_SeriesNumber("202", Me.SeriesName)

oDoc.ProductionOrderType = SAPbobsCOM.BoProductionOrderTypeEnum.bopotSpecial
oDoc.ProductionOrderStatus = SAPbobsCOM.BoProductionOrderStatusEnum.boposPlanned

If Me.TransactionDate IsNot Nothing Then oDoc.PostingDate = Me.TransactionDate.Value
If Me.TransactionDate IsNot Nothing Then oDoc.StartDate = Me.TransactionDate.Value
If Me.DueDate IsNot Nothing Then oDoc.DueDate = Me.DueDate.Value
oDoc.Remarks = Me.Comments

oDoc.ItemNo = Me.ProductNo
oDoc.PlannedQuantity = 1
oDoc.Warehouse = "ABO"


oDoc.Lines.ItemType = SAPbobsCOM.ProductionItemType.pit_Item
oDoc.Lines.ItemNo = "RSVBUCE"
oDoc.Lines.PlannedQuantity = 1
oDoc.Lines.BaseQuantity = 1
oDoc.Lines.Warehouse = "ABO"
oDoc.Lines.Add()


RetVal = oDoc.Add


If RetVal <> 0 Then
'Write Error
oCompany.GetLastError(_lErrCode, _sErrMsg)
_Log.ErrorFormat("Error Code: {0}, Message: {1}, TransNo.: {2}", lErrCode, sErrMsg, Me.TransactionNo)
_ReturnDTO = New PDReturnDTO With {
.SAPB1PONo = "",
.TransactionNo = Me.TransactionNo,
.ErrCode = lErrCode,
.ErrMsg = sErrMsg}

Else
'Write successfully
xDocEntry = oCompany.GetNewObjectKey()
HasTransNo("OWOR")

_Log.InfoFormat("AddNew Successfully: {0}", Me.TransactionNo)
_ReturnDTO = New PDReturnDTO With {
.SAPB1PONo = Me._SAPDocNum,
.TransactionNo = Me.TransactionNo,
.ErrCode = 0,
.ErrMsg = "",
.SAPB1DOCEntry = Me._SAPDocEntry}
End If

entry.title: Purchase Requisition items not showing My Inbox Fiori
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,

I'm implementing My Inbox after upgrading to SAP S4/HANA 2023.

I can't get the purchase requisitions items to appear in the app My Inbox 
I'm using Workflow WS20000077 with task TS20000159.

I implemented a note 3289039 - Missing item data in Purchase Requisition approval - SAP S/4HANA 2022 onward  and the following appears:

 

 

I maintain the settings before applying the note, and the header appears, but not the items.

 

I also followed the steps in this post.
Details of PR not showing on MY Fiori Inbox SAP S4/HANA 
Where I added and activated workflow WS20000077 in transaction SWETYPV.

And I checked task TS01800239 in SWFVISU

 

Thank you very much.
Regards,

entry.title: Re: Help Me Understand Exemptions IT0582
entry.content: Firstly you need to maintain necessary values in respective Processing classes later check if the wage type is processing as per our requirement

entry.title: Re: Issue with Loading/Creating Story Reports in Non-Prod...
entry.content:
Hi @Oscar28 

Story report will work in analytics module. So it is mandated to use IAS platform where SuccessFactors and Analytics module's sync/integration are configured. 

In IAS platform, SuccessFactors will push a "UUID" as a reference of authentication to enable the analytics module access. 

For the users who is facing issue in accessing the story report, get in touch with your admin who has IAS platform access and in the user's user information check whether UUID is available in any of the custom fields, if not get to know about the custom field configured to sync/update the UUID. 

Post updating the UUID in the required custom field at user information in IAS platform, save the user information and validate the story report access in SuccessFactors. 

If the issue is occurring for all users , recommend to run a user sync to IAS platform.

Thanks 

Arun

entry.title: Re: SAP Group Reporting - Post manual Journal Entry on Re...

entry.title: Re: Document Grounding in SAP AI Core: RAG with AWS S3 via Object Store Service on SAP BTP
entry.content:
HI Joni,
Excellent post! Very insightful walkthrough of how document grounding is implemented in SAP AI Core using RAG with AWS S3. I particularly appreciate the practical guidance on integrating the Object Store service — it helps bridge the gap between theory and real-world application. Looking forward to more content like this. Thanks for sharing!

entry.title: Calculated FS Item required in reporting in Analysis For Office – Group Reporting
entry.content:
Requirement:

We need a FS Item that would store or calculate at run time a formula in the report which requires a calculation of FS items.

For e.g. FS item Revenue / FS Item Cost

Please suggest how can we create an FS item which needs calculation with the basis of other FS items.

Example with values:

The highlighted FS Item is the requirement which is basically

FS Item Gross Revenue/ FS Item Direct Labour

Particulars

Amount

FS Item Gross revenue

100000

FS Item Direct labor

30000

Direct labor to gross revenue

30%

Thanks in Advance

 

SAP S/4HANA Finance for group reporting ,  SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office

entry.content:

2) The selection for a Monthly, Quarterly, Yearly needs to be done via the selection prompt

 

Request for a solution that we can implement to achieve this reporting requirement.

 

Thanks, in advance!

 

SAP S/4HANA Finance for group reporting , SAP S/4HANA Finance

entry.title: Re: The client is locked for data import by client copy
entry.content:
Hello,

You can still do SCC1 even when the client 200 is closed. Elaborate on what error you are getting which doing SCC1/SCC1N.

Thanks,

Dnyandev Kondekar

entry.title: SLD, License and Extension Manager Error Installing SAP Business One SP2502 SQL Version

Getting error during upgrade, please advise how to fix this error.

entry.title: IBP and S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Integration
entry.content:
I'm currently setting up the integration between SAP IBP and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and would like to confirm if my understanding is correct. I’d also appreciate links to relevant setup guides for each configuration step.

 My Understanding:

The integration requires three main configurations:

① Communication Settings on the S/4HANA Cloud side
I believe the following 4 communication scenarios are required:

SAP Datasphere - ABAP CDS Extraction - OData Integration (SAP_COM_0531)

Product Integration (SAP_COM_0009)

Business Partner, Customer and Supplier Integration (SAP_COM_0008)

Production Planning Integration (SAP_COM_0104)

Could you please confirm this is correct, and share setup documentation or Help Portal links for each scenario?

② Communication Settings on the IBP side
I understand that SAP_COM_0931 is the scenario used on the IBP side to receive data.
I would appreciate a guide on how to configure this: communication system, communication arrangement, receiving services, etc.

③ Configuration on Integration Suite (BTP)
Before deploying iFlows, I assume that we need to:

Enable services on Integration Suite

Configure connection parameters, such as communication system names and authentication credentials

Could you share specific instructions and documentation for this part?

My Current Setup Status:

Reviewed the Integration Flow package "SAP IBP – Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud" in BTP

Created communication arrangement SAP_COM_0009 on the S/4HANA Cloud side (see attached screenshot)

No communication configuration on the IBP side yet

Reference Materials I’m Using:

SAP IBP - Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Communication Management | SAP Help Portal

Setting Up the Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition | SAP Help Portal

Please kindly let me know if my assumptions are correct and provide any official setup guides for the scenarios listed above.

Thanks,

Ankur

entry.title: Re: Run UI5-tests with Karma in Azure-Pipelines
entry.content:
Hi ,
i have tried this blogpost and successfully was able to configure karma in Azure pipelines.

Thank you for the blog.

My project is under a folder structure -
<Main folder>/WEB/<Main Application whose tests have to be run>
However, when Karma executes the tests, the url of the api is fired with the whole path and fails like: 
https://port5500-workspaces-ws-gcbsk.eu20.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/<full project path>/api endpoint

but it has to run 

https://port5500-workspaces-ws-gcbsk.eu20.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/<api endpoint>

Kindly suggest

entry.title: Re: SAP PI for Beginners
entry.content: Excellent Piece of Work - very useful information

entry.title: Re: Document Currency is not changing at invoice level
entry.content:
Is that both the billing types are from same sales organizations ? If different, check the configuration of sales organization whether different currency is maintained there

Needless to mention, with the standard configuration, system will fetch the document currency from sales order and if that is not happening in your case, then, obviously, it could be due to custom logic.   Though you already indicated that you have checked whether any custom code is there and not, but still, I recommend taking the help of your ABAP team to set the break-point to find out the root cause

entry.title: Re: Down payment in sales order
entry.content: Without checking your system, it is difficult to assist you.  Did you check by clicking the 'Analysis' from condition tab which would show as to why, the value is zero ?

entry.title: Re: Define Planning Levels for Bank Statements EoD not vi...
entry.content:
Hello there, this is because you are trying to specify a memo record type that is defined for the "Residual Forecasts" category. Just avoid this one and try other types. You can find your definition of memo record types in the configuration activity Define Memo Record Types.

What are residual forecasts:

Reconcile Cash Flows

"You can reconcile both parties directly and ignore the difference, or you can manually create a residual flow to keep track of the unreconciled forecasted cash flows. You can choose from the following options:

  • Reconcile Without Residual: Choose this option if you want to reconcile cash flows and ignore the difference.

    The residual flows are created in the form of memo records with the memo record category Residual Forecast. You can see the residual flows and reconcile them with new intraday bank statement flows in the next round of reconciliation.

  • Reconcile: Choose this option if you want to reconcile cash flows and create a residual flow to keep a record of the difference and carry it forward to the next round of reconciliation.

    The residual flows are created in the form of memo records with the memo record category Residual Forecast. You can see the residual flows and reconcile them with new bank statement flows in the next round of reconciliation."

entry.title: Re: I am not able to login/register on OOTB spartacus sto...
entry.content: Same issue, there is no any request sent after click the login button.

entry.title: Re: Getting Started with iFlows in SAP Integration Suite: Step-by-Step Guide
entry.content: Helpful Insights .

entry.title: Re: SAP S4/HANA Cloud Public J78 Cash Flow reconciliation
entry.content:
Hello there, "Not applicable" means "The bank account has not been reconciled and currently no bank statement flows are available for reconciliation." Could it be that you have posted the bank statements? The reconciliation only works for non-posted bank statement flows.

For more information, please see:

Reconcile Cash Flows

entry.title: Re: Quick reference for Variable Pay Individual View and Enhanced Variable Pay Individual View
entry.content: Thank you for this incredibly informative post! Looking forward to more insightful content like this—keep up the great work!

entry.title: 用于将经典资产转换为优化体验的批量迁移工具
entry.content:
在最近的一篇博客中，SAP 分析云（SAC）团队报告称，作为持续改进计划的一部分，经典体验（故事和分析应用）以及其他非战略性功能将被优化体验所取代。

鉴于客户反馈指出在这一过渡阶段需要帮助，SAP 分析云 2024 Q4 版本将支持批量迁移工具。

⚠️警告：该工具目前仅限于企业版SAP 分析云使用。目前正对其进行增强，以便在嵌入式SAP 分析云中得到支持。建议您关注SAP 分析云路线图浏览器（点击此处）以获取最新状态。

接下来，让我们来了解一下批量迁移工具的一些关键特性，以及它如何帮助您顺利过渡到优化体验。

 

批量迁移工具（故事转换）


批量迁移工具可通过故事模块下的故事转换标签访问。将资产转换为优化体验涉及几个步骤，包括：

  1. 资产选择
  2. 转换检查与状态
  3. 转换设置
  4. 转换摘要

 

资产选择


在故事转换标签中，列出了相应用户具有编辑权限的资产。在初始版本中，将仅展示经典故事或优化视图模式下的经典故事。这意味着对于经典分析应用，设计者仍然需要逐个对象进行转换。

⚠️警告：请注意，批量迁移工具正在增强以支持将经典分析应用转换为优化体验。建议您关注SAP 分析云路线图浏览器（点击此处）以获取最新状态。

设计者可以直接选择对象，也可以选择文件夹。根据所选，右上角已选故事的计数器将会增加。

⚠️警告：一次性最多可以选择50个故事。

⚠️警告：选择文件夹时，会忽略不受支持的资产。此外，它不支持子文件夹中的故事。

选择需要转换为优化体验的对象后，请点击名为 “转换为优化故事” 的蓝色按钮。

 

转换检查与状态


在批量迁移之前，会进行一个转换过程。根据不受支持的功能（点击此处），可能会出现以下三种状态：

  1. 准备转换
  2. 功能限制
  3. 已阻止

准备转换

这些对象中，批量迁移工具未检测到任何不受支持或阻塞的功能。这意味着设计者无需进行任何操作即可继续进行迁移。

功能限制

这些对象中，批量迁移工具检测到至少一个不受支持的功能。从最佳实践的角度来看，是否应在迁移之前或之后解决这些问题取决于具体限制。

例如，对于会导致“虚化组件”（例如误差条、地理信息可视化功能层等）的功能，建议在迁移之前处理这些问题，因为这可以避免设计者在迁移后需要重新创建整个微件。

⚠️注意：某些功能（例如时钟微件）没有直接的替代品，确实需要重新创建对象或使用替代方案。对于这些功能，建议设计者在迁移之前不要对其进行修改。

对于可以无缝过渡或被静默移除的功能（例如分组、显示完整范围滑动条等），建议设计者在迁移之前不要修改这些对象。

已阻止

这些对象中，批量迁移工具检测到至少一个阻塞功能。这意味着设计者必须在迁移之前处理这些不受支持的功能。

然而，因为其他选定的对象可以继续进行迁移，“下一步”按钮不会被禁用。

具有功能限制或已阻止的对象

对于功能限制或已阻止的对象，会有一个信息图标可供点击。它将包含与手动转换为优化体验时相同的信息。

此外，还有一个选项可以在新标签页中打开对象，以便处理受影响的功能。

⚠️注意：如果已处理好所显示的问题，设计者需取消当前选择并重新选择需转换的对象。

 

转换设置


在转换设置中，用户可以选择将原始对象的副本转换为优化体验，或者直接将原始对象转换为优化体验。若选择转换原始对象的副本，副本将默认存储在原始对象所在的文件夹中。此外，还提供了创建全新文件夹以存放已转换故事的选项。

从最佳实践的角度来看，建议使用 “覆盖经典故事” 选项，因为这能确保原始对象被转换为优化体验。选择 “将转换的故事另存为副本” 会创建一个全新的对象，并且不会保留共享权限、书签等信息。

⚠️注意：从经典体验转换为优化体验是不可逆的。这意味着一旦对象被转换，就没有选项可以将其恢复为经典体验。

 

转换与转换摘要


在转换过程中，会显示一个进度条，为设计者提供转换状态的概览。设计者可以在任何时间点取消转换。

根据取消按钮被点击的时间点，可能会有一些对象已经完成了转换。确认取消对话框会告知设计者哪些对象已经完成转换，以及还有多少对象可以被取消。

在批量迁移完成之后，会向设计者提供一个概览。此外，还提供了一个选项，可以将状态下载为XLS格式，以便进行审核。

⚠️注意：在故事转换时，带有模型变量的故事不会被提示。相反，之前设置的值将被保留。

 

使用批量迁移工具的步骤

 

准备工作


建议设计者在开始批量迁移之前，熟悉优化体验的限制。这将帮助他们有效地使用该工具，并在存在某些不受支持的功能时，明智地决定哪些对象可以转换。

 

迁移后审查


完成迁移后，重要的是要审查资产。对于转换失败的资产，重要的是要审查故事，并尝试手动转换。

 

总结


从SAP分析云中的经典设计体验过渡到优化设计体验，标志着平台能力的显著提升。

批量迁移工具在促进这一过渡中发挥着至关重要的作用。通过遵循最佳实践并利用批量迁移工具，设计者可以确保快速过渡并充分发挥优化体验的潜力。

原文链接：Bulk Migration Tool to Convert Classic Assets to t... - SAP Community

原作者：Tunir

entry.title: Re: Preliminary What’s New Information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2508
entry.content:

entry.title: Re: Difference between LMS alternate supervisor and deleg...
entry.content:
ah, and one more thought on this one, after reading your request again

the alternate manager has a role that is derived from the user role, while for the delegate you have  specific role and you can grant only specific permissions (USER PROXY ROLE) - which can add a layer of restriction for the delegate that is decided by the admin. as well in the delegation process the manager can go with i want to chose from these settings, or grant the USER PROXY ROLE and whichever permissions you get. so it might be possible for example if you are not an approver per permission the notifications to behave totally different... but we did not test this thoroughly enough..

entry.title: Re: Can we do value mapping through MDG Consolidation ?
entry.content:
Hello T,

1. This particular adapter will utilise the value mapping already maintained in the system for the mapping. If value mapping is maintained between source system and consolidating system, the adapter will map the values else the inbound value will be considered.

2. Both options has its advantage and value addition.
If using ETL tool like BODS, it will be simpler in sense of value mapping where you can review the data pre and post conversion of values. But the value mapping has to be maintained in BODS for ETL purpose and same values to be maintained in MDG for MDG replication.
If using MDG consolidation for value mapping, all changes need to be visualized in the consolidation FIORI App. Performance and sizing need to be considered for better processing. But value mapping is maintained only in MDG system.

 

Regards,

Saravanan

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors compensation statements
entry.content: thank you Xavier

entry.title: Re: SAP Retail Pricing Function PRICE_CALCULATE_POSTING & VKP6
entry.content:
To replicate the price activation functionality of VKP6 and correctly populate internal tables like G_T_KOMV and G_T_KALP.
you need to follow a specific sequence of function modules and data preparation steps.

 Prepare Pricing Structures

Use the FM SPR_KOMK_KOMP_FILL to populate:

  • KOMK (Header pricing data)
  • KOMP (Item pricing data)

This is essential before calling any pricing-related FM.

 Populate Pricing Conditions

Manually or programmatically fill the internal table KOMV with relevant condition types and values. This is often done based on:

  • Material
  • Sales area
  • Pricing procedure

You can also use FM PRICING to calculate and populate KOMV based on KOMK and KOMP 

 Call Price Activation FM

Use PRICE_CALCULATE_POSTING to simulate the VKP6 activation. This FM expects:

  • G_T_KALP to be filled with item-level pricing data.
  • G_T_KOMV to contain calculated condition values.

If G_T_KOMV is empty, it means pricing was not calculated or the conditions were not fetched correctly.

CALL FUNCTION 'SPR_KOMK_KOMP_FILL'
EXPORTING
... "Pass material, org data, etc.
IMPORTING
E_KOMK = ls_komk
E_KOMP = ls_komp.

CALL FUNCTION 'PRICING'
EXPORTING
KOMK = ls_komk
KOMP = ls_komp
TABLES
KOMV = lt_komv.

" Now lt_komv contains pricing conditions
MOVE lt_komv TO G_T_KOMV.
MOVE item data TO G_T_KALP.

CALL FUNCTION 'PRICE_CALCULATE_POSTING'
... " With G_T_KOMV and G_T_KALP filled

  • Ensure that BPSTA is updated correctly to reflect status change from A to C.
  • You may need to simulate the pricing procedure determination if calling from a Fiori app.
  • Consider wrapping this logic in a custom RFC for clean integration with your app.

entry.title: Re: Sum up values of MDF object on parent object
entry.content: @heikeklews That worked! Thank you

entry.title: Re: HANA Memory KPI used in CALM not same as SAP4Me
entry.content:
Hello @lvbarat 

This is a great question, and it often arises when comparing system metrics across different SAP monitoring tools.

The difference you're seeing is expected due to how and when each tool collects memory usage. CALM reflects real-time application-level usage, while SAP for Me gives a periodic snapshot of SAP's backend systems, which may include buffer or reserved memory. For technical monitoring and live troubleshooting, CALM is more accurate. For licence and consumption tracking, SAP for Me is the correct reference.

This Illustrates the Difference

Source

CALM (Cloud ALM)

SAP for Me

Metric Type

Real-time operational memory usage

Backend snapshot for licensing/quota

Data Frequency

Dynamic; near-real-time via monitoring services

Periodic, aggregated meter

Content

Includes buffers, runtime caches, monitoring data

Includes reserved capacity, contract-level metrics

 

Hope it helps

Thank you and kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Using ABAP RAP, show radio buttons in a popup
entry.content:
Hi,
I have a simple requirement to show a popup containing four radio buttons using ABAP RAP.

First Try
I tried to use abstract entity and was able to show the popup with Input & CheckBox but cannot find a suitable datatype that renders a Radio button.

If there exist a suitable data type that renders radio button, it would be one of the easiest solution.

SecondTry
I tried to use a custom CDS enumerated type in my abstract entity but discovered that it is not supported.
Yes, we do have other options of extending the Fiori element in BAS using UI5 or Flexible Programming model but I want to avoid that and find a solution within RAP itself.

Hi Alan,

If you are still facing issues, do reach out to us via support_rasd@sap.com.  Please note that RASD will be updated with the 2508 preliminary content within 2-3 business days after the release of preliminary what's new.

Thanks,
Prasanth

entry.title: DM - POD error with new user
entry.content:
Hi community,

we have created several new users in our dm. On our Work Center POD we are using the activity confirmation plugin. We are now facing an error a our POD that says that the user is not assigned to the corresponding work center, but we have checked all user assignsments and the users are assigned to the work centers. It still works for older users.

Is there anyone who knows how to solve this?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: The client is locked for data import by client copy
entry.content:
Hello,

Tcode SCC1, SCC1N usage will be refrained into system due to below setting into Tcode SCC4 -

Client Copy & Comparison Tool Protection 

Please make it to - Protection Level 0: No restriction to enable it.

Tcode SCC1N has been introduced from SAP_BASIS 755.

Hence your system's client can be locked for cross client and repository objects and you need to review above setting to enable Tcode SCC1, SCC1N.

Best Regards,

Rupali

entry.title: Re: Alation HANA DB Connector in violation of HANA Runtim...
entry.content:
I can tell you about Collibra because I am using it.
You connect the source systems you want to DSP, and in the DSP catalog it creates the assets that represent the different objects (analytical models, views, tables).

Collibra connects to the DSP catalog (not to the source systems connected to DSP) and extracts the information from these assets. There is no odbc access to any site. It will not see anything that is not in the DSP catalog because as I said it does not access the source, only what is published in the DSP catalog.

Best regards.

Thanks

Nagaraj

entry.title: Handle "MaxListenersExceededWarning" which calling multiple external API's in SAP CAPM
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are doing a quarterly cleanup of shadow users from BTP cockpit based on the last logon date. We are using the XSUAA API to fetch the users from a Subaccount. As we have multiple subaccounts I have called the Central Information Service to get the list of Subaccounts and then for all subaccounts I fetch the users from each subaccount. Sequence is:

  1. Fetch all subaccounts using cds.connect.to('subaccountdest')
  2. Fetch users in subaccounts via promise all for parallel processing calling each subaccount via cds.connect.to('dynamincssubacdest')

I have the below code:

async function getXsuaaConnection(subdomain) {
    const dest = `xsuaa-api-${subdomain}`;
    try {
        if (!xsuaaConnections[dest]) {
            xsuaaConnections[dest] = await cds.connect.to(dest);
        }
        return xsuaaConnections[dest];
    } catch (err) {
        console.error(`❌ Failed to connect to destination ${dest}:`, err.message);
        throw new Error(`Connection to ${dest} failed`);
    }
}

async function getUsersNew(xsuaa, saDomain, saID, saName) {
    try {
        const xsuaaResp = await xsuaa.get('/Users?count=500');
        const xsuaaUsers = xsuaaResp.resources || [];
        return {
            users: xsuaaUsers.map(user => ({
                userName: user.userName,
                externalId: user.externalId,
                btpId: user.id,
                firstName: user.name?.givenName,
                lastName: user.name?.familyName,
                displayName: `${user.name?.givenName || ''} ${user.name?.familyName || ''}`,
                eMail: user.emails?.[0]?.value || null,
                origin: user.origin,
                isActive: user.active,
                isVerified: user.verified,
                lastLogon: getDate(user.lastLogonTime),
                parent_ID: saID,
                subName: saName,
                subDomain: saDomain,
                createdOn: user.meta?.created
            }))
        };
    } catch (err) {
        console.error(`❌ Failed to fetch users for subdomain ${saDomain}:`, err.message);
        return { users: [] };
    }
}

async function getSa() {
    try {
        const subAccResp = await cis.get('/accounts/v1/subaccounts');
        let subAccs = Array.isArray(subAccResp?.value) ? subAccResp.value : [];

        subAccs = subAccs.filter(sa =>
            sa.subdomain !== 'appdev' && sa.subdomain !== 'ext-portal'
        );

        const subAccounts = subAccs.map(sa => ({
            id: sa.guid,
            name: sa.displayName,
            region: sa.region,
            subDomain: sa.subdomain,
            desc: sa.description
        }));

        const userResults = await Promise.all(
            subAccs.map(async sa => {
                try {
                    const xsuaa = await getXsuaaConnection(sa.subdomain);
                    return await getUsersNew(xsuaa, sa.subdomain, sa.guid, sa.displayName);
                } catch (err) {
                    console.error(`⚠️ Skipping subaccount ${sa.subdomain}:`, err.message);
                    return { users: [] };
                }
            })
        );

        const users = userResults.flatMap(r => r.users);
        return { subaccounts: subAccounts, users };
    } catch (err) {
        console.error('❌ Failed to fetch subaccounts:', err.message);
        return { subaccounts: [], users: [] };
    }
}

As we have more than 10 calls I get the below warning(In future we can have more calls as well) :

"MaxListenersExceededWarning: Possible EventEmitter memory leak detected. 11 succeeded listeners added to [EventEmitter]"

Presently I have increased the limit of Event Emitters and warning is gone, but I have read that this is not a best practice. 

Any help will be appreciated.

@qmacro 

Regards

Braham

entry.title: SAP XMII
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

As manufacturing professionals, many of us rely on SAP Manufacturing Integration and Intelligence (MII) to connect shop floor operations with our ERP systems. However, SAP has announced that support for SAP MII and SAP MES will end on December 31, 2030, extended from the original 2027 deadline. With only five years left, it’s time to plan our transition to avoid disruptions.

I’ve been researching SAP MII’s retirement and the options available, and I’d love to hear your thoughts. What’s your organization’s plan? Are you facing challenges or finding successes in this transition? Let’s share insights to navigate this change together!

entry.title: Re: SSL error while connecting web service using SOAP in SAP CPI
entry.content: Hello, Is this issue resolved ?

entry.title: Re: Inquiry about Adapt UI on Dependent Fields in Customi...
entry.content:
Hello @Tiffany3 

Thank you for your question regarding UI adaptation in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. You’ve raised an important and common topic, especially as you approach go-live preparation.

Recommended Approach

Yes, it is fully acceptable and SAP-supported to temporarily create sample master data in the Customization Tenant (D/C) solely for the purpose of performing Adapt UI tasks — especially when the UI elements you need to modify are context-dependent and only become visible after entering certain data (e.g., a project profile or category).

This is a recognized best practice during the Fit-to-Standard and extensibility phase when adapting runtime-driven screens. Since UI adaptation is only possible on rendered fields, creating minimal data helps surface the correct screen state.

Best Practice Guidelines

  • Create lightweight “dummy” master data (e.g., a test project, sales doc, asset).
  • Use this data to access the desired screen state in the Project Control – Enterprise Projects app.
  • Perform your UI adjustments (label rename, visibility, grouping, etc.).
  • Delete or flag the test data after use (e.g., prefix with ZTEST_) — it is not transported.
  • Transport only the UI adaptation layer via the Export Software Collection app.

What to Avoid

  • Do not create large volumes or use real/production-like master data in the D/C tenant.
  • Ensure that the dummy data is not used in any configuration testing or migrated to T/P.

SAP Official Reference

SAP Note 2680324 “Adapt UI relies on screen context and runtime rendering of UI elements. Fields not visible at runtime cannot be adapted.”

We’re here to support a smooth and confident go live.

Warm regards,

Chuma

entry.title: How to Check View Counts for AM in sac add-in for excel
entry.content:
Hello.

User is looking up the AM created in datasphere through sac add-in for excel.

Is there an administrator menu where I can see how much each AM has been viewed in sac add-in for excel?

entry.title: Re: [SAC] - How to set the Story filter's active members?
entry.content: The PageFilter component does not expose any API for retrieving selected members. To access selected values, consider using InputControl or FilterLine, which provide programmatic access to selected members.

entry.title: EWA Generation - SAP NetWeaver System w/o Solman
entry.content:
Hello 
Without a solution manager, we are now creating Earlywatch alert reports for the ABAP, Java, and HANA systems.(which means SAPForMe directly communicating our systems)

We have successfully built the ABAP system, however we are just beginning the NW Java system. Could you please advise us on how to proceed?  
Requirement:  EWA generation for the NetWeaver java system alone without Solman

Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: EWA Generation - SAP NetWeaver System w/o Solman
entry.content:
For AS JAVA System, Focused Run Or Solution Manager system is needed, to generate the EarlyWatch Alert report.
Only with Focused Run system, the JAVA EWA data can be transferred to the EWA application in SAP for Me.
For HANA database, if you run HANA native applications - this is a HANA system without an ABAP system on top - HANA Cockpit transfers the EWA data to SAP. HANA Cockpit is the right choice if you have no Solution Manager or Focused Run. 

For more details, please refer to the SAP note 1257308 - FAQ: Using EarlyWatch Alert

entry.title: Re: Currency conversion insufficient privilege
entry.content:
It is strange.

When creating currency conversion views in DEV and PRD (shared from SAP_CONTENT), both spaces have their own objects, like “SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURX”, etc.

Currency conversions created in DEV should use the DEV views (accessing to SAP_CONTENT tables), and when exported to PRD, they should access the ones in PRD (accessing to SAP_CONTENT tables), without problems because they use the same technical name in DEV and PRD.

If that is not the case, and you get the permissions failure, I would say it is because somehow from PRD it is trying to access the DEV currency conversion views, as if it “remembers” something like "DEV". "SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURX" instead of just ”SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURX" (withouth the space)

As a workaround, you could share those views from DEV to PRD to make that call work, but it doesn't seem very robust.

Another option, if you are using currency conversion in the graphical views, would be to do them with the CURRENCY_CONVERSION() function instead of the “wizard”, that should work like any other function and referencing the tables as “SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURX” should be transparent and work in PRD as well.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Enhanced FinOps Capabilities for SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hello,

that is great news. Will/can this functionality also be extended to the functionalities using AI units? It would be great to also have that in the tool. Thanks for putting it in the roadmap and giving some timeline for GA.

BR, Michael

entry.title: Re: Tax calculation logic by Developer Extensibility In P...
entry.content: Dear Patryk, Thank you for your reply. Here are my questions: This content seems to be for the U.S. But localization of my project is for Japan, can we still use it? We plan to create a program (PGM) to output invoices using Developer Extensibility (to be displayed as a tile). Within this PGM, we intend to summarize the amounts of the output line items by tax code and recalculate the tax amount. To achieve this, please let us know if there are any BAdI or CDS Views (or ways to combine these views) available in Public Cloud's Developer Extensibility that we can use.

entry.title: The growth of DSVASRESULTSGEN table
entry.content:
Solman本番機にて、DSVASRESULTSGENテーブルが月に１GB以上増加しており、ディスク領域が逼迫傾向にあります。
現在システム上で、EWAアーカイブ（RDARCH_ARCHIVE_DATA_SOLMAN）や削除（RDSMOPREDUCEDATA）などのレポートは定期実行されていません。

まずは以下確認させてください。
1) DSVASRESULTSGENテーブルが月に１GB以上増加するのは正常な動作でしょうか。
2) Note.2075483を確認しましたが、現在の状況においてはEWAアーカイブもしくは削除のジョブを実行することにより、
   この状況を改善することができるでしょうか。

On the Solman production system, the DSVASRESULTSGEN table is growing by more than 1GB per month, and disk space is becoming tight.
Currently, reports such as EWA archiving (RDARCH_ARCHIVE_DATA_SOLMAN) and deletion (RDSMOPREDUCEDATA) are not run regularly on the system.

Please let me first confirm the following.
1) Is it normal for the DSVASRESULTSGEN table to grow by more than 1GB per month?
2) I have checked Note.2075483, but in the current situation, would it be possible to improve this situation by running an EWA archiving or deletion job?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: The growth of DSVASRESULTSGEN table
entry.content:
＞1) DSVASRESULTSGENテーブルが月に１GB以上増加するのは正常な動作でしょうか。
→DSVASRESULTSGENテーブルはすべてのサービス セッション情報が含まれていますので、月に１GB以上増加するのは正常な動作です。

＞2) Note.2075483を確認しましたが、現在の状況においてはEWAアーカイブもしくは削除のジョブを実行することにより、この状況を改善することができるでしょうか。 

→はい、ご認識の通りです。
Solmanをご利用の際、ディスク枯渇の心配或いは問題がある場合は、まず下記KBAをご参照いただき、DBACockpitもしくはほかのデータベースツールからテーブルサイズのTop 10とサイズ増加スピードTop 10を特定し、
各々のテーブル に対し、ハウスキーピング作業を検討することをお推奨いたします。
2549260 - Certain tables in Solution Manager system grow fast

尚、ディスク枯渇現象が主としてDSVASRESULTSGENによる場合は、以下のノートに従えば改善できます。
2075483 - EarlyWatch Alert Archiving 
2427041 - How to delete old EWA sessions according to retention times automatically through a job 

どのぐらいのデータを保存することはお客様次第で、レポート実行中指定する必要で、お手数ですが、御社運用上の必要に応じて、ご決定お願いします。


As per 2549260 - Certain tables in Solution Manager system grow fast
The table contain service session information for all the sessions delivered in Solution Manager. Old sessions can be deleted via standard report RDSMOPREDUCEDATA.
See SAP Notes for more information.
2075483 - EarlyWatch Alert Archiving 
2427041 - How to delete old EWA sessions according to retention times automatically through a job

Dear Team,

I am adding condition type (ZIOB) in my sale order(va02). That condition type not coming in invoice. 

My requirement is if i am adding condition type in sale order that will be reflected in invoice also. kindly suggest user exits for my requirement.

entry.title: Re: BTP Workzone (standard) update config to allow additional origin
entry.content:
Hi Chantele, good luck on this. I have raised an incident with SAP on this, and show them that the error is caused by BTP/Workzone common router, unfortunately they still insist pointing this back to S/4, trying to fix from S/4. We have checked the cloud connector log, where there is no request hit the cloud connector, mean the request stopped in BTP.

Somehow tested 3 subaccounts, 2 subaccounts are having this issue, where 1 subaccount is working fine that able to accept any origin from the caller. Not sure is region specific setup.

US10 working 

US10-001 and CA10 are not working.

Which subaccount region you have now?

The workaround we have is getting user to only access the catalog within internal network and the webhook URL is pointing to internal S/4 Fiori URL launchpad host. The downside is user will not able to use the catalog from public network when accessing workzone, and will have to login S/4 Fiori backend at least one as login is popup.

entry.title: Re: Solace from Scratch: A Beginner’s Guide to Setting Up Your First Event Broker
entry.content: Why is a solace.com blog relevant on a SAP website? If you want to reach the SAP community, please leverage SAP-oriented technologies.

entry.title: Re: How to turn off network access logs but keep cds.log in logging on CAP?
entry.content: Can you provide a sample log to show us what you are referring to?

entry.title: Re: User Exits - Adding Condition type in sale order
entry.content: What for this ZIOB condition type configured?  If you want to copy the manual condition type from sale order to billing, set "C" to pricing type in copy control configuration VTFL.  Of course, this will have impact on other condition types.  For any reason, if this standard configuration change is not possible,  then, you can try with RV60AFZZ

entry.title: Re: User Exits - Adding Condition type in sale order
entry.content: Thanks for your response, sir.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition のためのSAP Build 拡張ウィザード概要
entry.content:
@kenjigoto 

こちらの共有ありがとうございます。3-system landscapeの場合、拡張ウィザードはCustomizing テナントまたはDevelopmentテナント、どちらに設定するべきでしょうか？

entry.title: S4hana RISE on Private Cloud Vistex component
entry.content:
Hello All,

Please can someone help me with the following.

We are converting from S4HANA 1909 to SAP S4HANA RISE on PRIVATE CLOUD. We have Vistex in 1909 which are referencing /IRM/ Tables in SAP which are Vistex Tables while calculating prices against agreements created in Vistex.

We have decided to discontinue Vistex and create all agreements in SAP RISE . During conversion if Vistex component is removed can we view these orders(Vistex Related) in SAP RISE once the Vistex component is removed.

IF not , please can you suggest an alternative how to view the Vistex related orders in RISE once the component has been removed.

An early response will be highly appreciated.

Thanks and Regards.

entry.title: Re: User Exits - Adding Condition type in sale order
entry.content: If your query is answered, please close the discussion by clicking "Accept as a Solution"

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation - Add a Document Template Error
entry.content:
I am trying to create an artifact for a Document Template in SAP Build on BTP Trial. However, when I select the option to create a Document Template, I receive the following error:

"SAP_IPA_28014: The requested Document Information Extraction service operation could not be completed."

This error is preventing the creation of the template.

I have already assigned the role 'Document_Information_Extraction_UI_Templates_Admin' to my account.

Could you please help resolve this issue?

SAP Build 
SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Re: Allowance Creation and Activation Upon Subscription C...
entry.content:
Hi,
If you want to create the allowance automatically in CC during contract creation the following is needed:

  1. In the allowance definition group you must set the flag for contract creation.
  2. In the CCM mapping you must assign this allowance definition group.

When I understand you correctly, you missed step 2 and you assigned "Full Table". So, you should change your CCM mapping and then it should work.

Best regards,
Thomas

entry.title: Re: Introducing the RISE with SAP System Transition Workbench
entry.content:
Nice post, I am just a bit confused about the difference/separation/positioning of SUM (Software Update Manager) and the Transition Workbench.

I initially thought that the Transition Workbench contains SUM for transitioning from a source system (e.g., SAP ECC) to S/4HANA On-Prem.

However, you then state that the Transition workbench is designed to be an extension of tools like SUM. Yet, when you list the different options in the Transition workbench, one of the options is SUM. So I am a bit confused about the relationship between the two.

Also, from what I understand, the Transition Workbench is only for transition to Private Cloud and not S4Hana on-prem?

Could you clarify?

entry.title: Re: How to turn off network access logs but keep cds.log in logging on CAP?
entry.content: Please check the screenshot of cloud logging, the requests were recorded by our acess loging and log messages (By CAP)

entry.title: Re: Discover the Fresh New Design of SAP Help Portal
entry.content: @alley-buba I think the main issue with the dark theme is that it is done via cookies. If it would be stored in the user account settings, this would be more robust and also in-line with e.g. me.sap.com

entry.title: Re: New Z field in TU transaction
entry.content: you can modify the screen. Actually this is the case, when I would suggest to the key user "to use ALV for this" 🙂

entry.title: Connecting SAP DM to Multiple CPI Instances
entry.content:
We already connected CPI to the DM test environment. We are now planning to connect the Integration Suite to SAP DM. 

Could you please confirm whether one SAP DM can connect to two CPI instances simultaneously?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Connecting SAP DM to Multiple CPI Instances
entry.content:
Currently two CPI tenants for one DM tenant is not supported. According to the integration guide, the CPI destination could only be configrued with one.
https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/integration-guide/connection-with-basic-authentication-neo-and-cloud-foundry?locale=en-US&q=integration+guide
